purpose: Introduces Synapse's multi-dashboard architecture: dashboards are dynamically created with 6-char hex IDs (no fixed slot limit), each fully isolated with its own initialization.json, logs.json, and progress/ directory. Different dashboards can run different projects simultaneously (project_root field per dashboard). Server watches all dashboards in parallel with fs.watch/fs.watchFile and broadcasts SSE events scoped by dashboard ID.
gotchas: Dashboards are created on demand by nextDashboardId() using crypto.randomBytes(3) -- collisions are checked
IDE dashboards are pinned at the top of the sidebar; user dashboards reorderable via drag-and-drop
All stats are derived at render time from progress files -- no maintained counters anywhere
patterns: Per-dashboard isolation with no shared state between swarms
conventions: Dashboard IDs are 6-character lowercase hex strings
task.project_root in initialization.json identifies which project a swarm targets
